content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Toptal: Senior Rust Engineer — Production Backend Systems | Remote (LATAM) Anywhere in the World 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, 🇲🇽 Mexico, and 🇺🇾 Uruguay California All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5797/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.toptal.com/">https://www.toptal.com/</a> </p> <h2>About the Role</h2> <p>We're looking for Senior Rust Engineers to take real ownership of a high-performance, production backend. You'll be working on mission-critical systems where performance, security, and reliability aren't nice-to-haves — they're the job. Whether the work is hardening core services for a cybersecurity product or extending a Rust-based backend that powers a cross-platform application, this role is for someone who can navigate complex, unfamiliar codebases quickly and start shipping production-ready code fast.</p> <h2>What You'll Do</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Build, optimize, and maintain high-performance backend services in Rust</p> </li> <li> <p>Take ownership of core backend architecture, including remediating vulnerabilities and improving CI/CD workflows</p> </li> <li> <p>Interface with PostgreSQL for complex data management, persistence, and schema-oriented design</p> </li> <li> <p>Design and work with schema-oriented service patterns (e.g., gRPC) where applicable</p> </li> <li> <p>Deploy and maintain services on AWS</p> </li> <li> <p>Jump into an existing, unfamiliar codebase and reach full productivity within the first 1–2 weeks</p> </li> <li> <p>Submit clean, high-quality code that holds up to rigorous review and peer scrutiny</p> </li> <li> <p>Take increasing ownership of backend direction as the system evolves or transitions from a legacy team</p> </li> </ul> <h2>What You Bring</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Expert-level or extensive senior-level experience with Rust in a production environment</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong experience with PostgreSQL and SQL database design</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong experience with AWS for hosting and deployment</p> </li> <li> <p>Proven track record on large-scale, mission-critical, or high-stakes systems where performance and reliability matter</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience working as a senior individual contributor on evolving production systems</p> </li> <li> <p>Ability to explain complex architectural decisions and take full ownership of submitted code</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable working independently and ramping quickly on unfamiliar codebases</p> </li> </ul> <h2>Nice to Have</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Familiarity with GitHub-based development workflows</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with gRPC or Avro-based schema design</p> </li> <li> <p>Exposure to Flutter-based product environments (web, mobile, or desktop)</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfort using AI-assisted coding tools (e.g., Claude) without sacrificing code quality</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>RATE: $35-$45/hr.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong><br><br></strong></p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/toptal-senior-rust-engineer-production-backend-systems-remote-latam">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/toptal-senior-rust-engineer-production-backend-systems-remote-latam</a></p> https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/toptal-senior-rust-engineer-production-backend-systems-remote-latam Toptal: AI/Platform Engineer — AWS Bedrock Agentcore Anywhere in the World 🇮🇳 India California All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5796/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.toptal.com/">https://www.toptal.com/</a> </p> <h2>About the Role</h2> <p>We're looking for engineers to help build and productionize AI systems that go well beyond proof-of-concept — real conversational AI, RAG pipelines, and agent architectures running on AWS Bedrock and/or Azure OpenAI, serving live traffic and real users. Whether your strength is on the AI application side (agents, RAG, orchestration) or the platform side (deployment, observability, security), this role sits at the center of turning working demos into production-grade, reliable systems. If you like being close to the frontier of agentic AI and want your work to ship rather than sit in a notebook, this is built for that.</p> <h2>What You'll Do</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Design, build, and deploy conversational AI systems, chatbots, and AI agents powered by large language models</p> </li> <li> <p>Architect and ship production-grade RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems — not prototypes, but systems serving live traffic</p> </li> <li> <p>Build and deploy LLM applications on AWS Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, AgentCore, or equivalent platforms</p> </li> <li> <p>Develop and orchestrate agent architectures using frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, or LlamaIndex</p> </li> <li> <p>Build and maintain MCP (Model Context Protocol) server integrations to extend agent capabilities</p> </li> <li> <p>Design and build the production service layer (Lambda, API Gateway, IAM, DynamoDB, OpenSearch, or equivalents)</p> </li> <li> <p>Establish CI/CD pipelines and manage development, beta, and production environments</p> </li> <li> <p>Implement observability: tracing, dashboards, per-turn cost and latency metrics, error rates, and audit trails</p> </li> <li> <p>Implement key security controls — data-leakage protection, session isolation, auth/authz boundaries, secure prompt/response storage</p> </li> <li> <p>Write clean, maintainable, production-quality Python across the AI application and platform stack</p> </li> <li> <p>Monitor, evaluate, and iterate on agent, RAG, and platform performance in production</p> </li> <li> <p>Stay current with fast-moving developments in LLMs, agentic systems, and cloud AI platforms, and bring relevant advances into the project</p> </li> </ul> <h2>What You Bring</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Proven experience building conversational AI systems, AI agents, or AI platform infrastructure in production — not personal projects or tutorials</p> </li> <li> <p>Hands-on experience with LLM application platforms: AWS Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, AgentCore, or similar</p> </li> <li> &
